case_title: JOHN M. LEE VS. TOBI STUART ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999 AS TO DEFENDANT STUART, TOBI DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999 ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT STUART, TOBI
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STUART, TOBI
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON AUG-14-2025.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999

MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $300.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE AUG-11-2016, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999

DECLARATION OF JOHN M. LEE IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $170.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STUART, TOBI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1536 SACRAMENTO STREET #3 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 $3,322.93 RENT, $1,750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,072.93, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT STUART, TOBI
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AND MPA; DECLARATION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JOHN M. CO-TRUSTEE OF THE JOHN M. LEE AND LILY T. LEE REVOCABLE TRUST U/D/T DATED MAY 12, 1999
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION ; COPY OF ORDER AND JUDGMENT IN D501'S OUTBOX, (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
